inference.increment_support_rule: BH-adjusted residual q <= 0.05 and the lower 95% Delta-MSE interval exceeds the frozen practical threshold.

nuisance_sensitivity.degree_2_status: diagnostic failure control; excluded from primary inference after known-ground-truth calibration
nuisance_sensitivity.extra_trees_status: frozen tested configuration failed known-ground-truth proxy calibration; preserved as a failure control and excluded from primary inference
nuisance_sensitivity.disagreement_rule: Report every eligible learner. Do not select a learner using real metric favorability.

inference.multiplicity: Benjamini-Hochberg within task and baseline level

holdout_rule: Freeze metric implementations, nuisance controls, thresholds, and development/validation report before computing or inspecting metric outputs for tasks 6-9.

amendments.reason: Known-ground-truth Monte Carlo calibration exposed false increments under degree-2 nuisance misspecification and a full-data rank-transform leak.
amendments.changes: Rank transforms are fit inside training folds; degree 2 and the tested Extra Trees configuration are retained only as failure diagnostics; additive degree 4/6 and degree-6 pairwise-interaction ridge enter frozen sensitivity reporting; increment support requires both adjusted residual evidence and interval-supported predictive improvement.
amendments.timing: Frozen before full Tasks 1-2 checkpoint metric extraction and before all Tasks 4-9 checkpoint metric outputs.

weight_metric_definitions.kernel_matrix_rule: Flatten all kernel input axes and retain the final output axis.
weight_metric_definitions.spectral_estimator: Exact singular-value decomposition; squared layer norms are summed or summed in log space.
weight_metric_definitions.frobenius_aggregation: Squared layer norms are summed or summed in log space.
weight_metric_definitions.bias_policy: Biases are included in whole-model parameter and update norms but excluded from layer product/sum measures.

notes: CEI-R is exploratory and cannot determine MBE thresholds or the primary narrative. Product measures are represented in log space to prevent overflow; this naming clarification was frozen before pilot metric outputs were computed.
